description.value:
• Action Cost: 2 [Combat] actions
  • Range: 30-foot radius centered on you
  • Effect: All enemies within range who attacked an ally since your last turn take Fire damage equal to your Tier × 8. Each target makes [[/save type=reflex]] (Agility + Luck). Compare your Wisdom + Fire Mastery to their save successes. Net successes determine damage: Net 0 or less = No damage, Net 1 = Half damage (Tier × 4), Net 2+ = Full damage (Tier × 8).
  • Damage Type: Fire (energy), Half DR
  • Usage: Uses 1 Channel Divinity

system.effect: All enemies within range who attacked an ally since your last turn take Fire damage equal to your Tier × 8. Each target makes Reflex save (Agility + Luck). Compare your Wisdom + Fire Mastery to their save successes. Net successes determine damage: Net 0 or less = No damage, Net 1 = Half damage (Tier × 4), Net 2+ = Full damage (Tier × 8).
